SELECT arrayCumSumNonNegative(arr) AS res FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id Int32, value Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayCumSumNonNegative(value) AS res FROM temp_table;
CREATE TABLE multi_table (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id Int32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT m.id, arrayCumSumNonNegative(m.arr) AS m_res, arrayCumSumNonNegative(a.values) AS a_res FROM multi_table m JOIN another_table a ON m.id = a.ref_id;
